//: Build-specific TS config used by tsup for the .d.ts emission step.
//1: The main tsconfig.json sets rootDir to the monorepo root because integration tests pull from sibling packages — that breaks `tsc --emitDeclarationOnly` here because it tries to emit a parallel dist tree for every file under rootDir.
//2: We narrow include to just src/ and drop the wide rootDir + the deprecated baseUrl. Result: clean .d.ts emission scoped to the package's own source.
